task_description: Predicting the appropriate stoichiometric coefficient to complete the given reaction.

input: The reaction between calcium phosphate(V) and coke is \ce{Ca3(PO4)2 + 8C -> xCO + Ca3P2}. What is x?

input: Attending only to valency, if the element X has atomic number 6, how many fluorine atoms does it need to bond to form a stable compound?

task_description: Average number of monomer units in each polymer chain
prompt: Given that the average molar mass of the polymer chains in this sample of poly(lactic acid) (PLA) is \pu{595 g mol^{-1}} using end-group analysis, where \pu{0.1619 g} of PLA was dissolved in \pu{25 cm^3} of benzyl alcohol and titrated with \pu{0.0400 mol dm^{-3}} \ce{KOH} solution. The volume of \ce{KOH} solution required to reach the endpoint was \pu{6.81 cm^3}. What is the average number of monomer units in each polymer chain of this sample?
input: Given that the average molar mass of the polymer chains in this sample of poly(lactic acid) (PLA) is \pu{595 g mol^{-1}} using end-group analysis, where \pu{0.1619 g} of PLA was dissolved in \pu{25 cm^3} of benzyl alcohol and titrated with \pu{0.0400 mol dm^{-3}} \ce{KOH} solution. The volume of \ce{KOH} solution required to reach the endpoint was \pu{6.81 cm^3}. What is the average number of monomer units in each polymer chain of this sample?

task_description: Poly(lactic acid) synthesis by condensation polymerization
prompt: How can you determine the average molar mass of polymer chains in a sample of poly(lactic acid) (PLA) using end-group analysis? In this procedure, \pu{0.1619 g} of PLA was dissolved in \pu{25 cm^3} of benzyl alcohol, and the mixture was titrated with \pu{0.0400 mol dm^{-3}} \ce{KOH} solution. The volume of \ce{KOH} solution required to reach the endpoint was \pu{6.81 cm^3}. What is the average molar mass of the polymer chains in the sample of PLA (in \pu{g mol^{-1}})?
input: How can you determine the average molar mass of polymer chains in a sample of poly(lactic acid) (PLA) using end-group analysis? In this procedure, \pu{0.1619 g} of PLA was dissolved in \pu{25 cm^3} of benzyl alcohol, and the mixture was titrated with \pu{0.0400 mol dm^{-3}} \ce{KOH} solution. The volume of \ce{KOH} solution required to reach the endpoint was \pu{6.81 cm^3}. What is the average molar mass of the polymer chains in the sample of PLA (in \pu{g mol^{-1}})?

input: How many structural isomers (excluding stereochemistry) are there for \ce{C4H8O}?

task_description: Choosing the correct number of electrons for the active space
prompt: Focussing only on the pi orbitals, what is the correct number of electrons of the active space to build the PES for the tetracene molecule using the CASSCF method?
input: Focussing only on the pi orbitals, what is the correct number of electrons of the active space to build the PES for the tetracene molecule using the CASSCF method?

What would be the air flow rate (\pu{L/min}) if reactants enter the burner at \pu{25 deg C}, \pu{101.325 kPa} and air to fuel equivalence ratio ($\lambda$) of 1.2?
